description_long: This is a countertop electric stand mixer with a robust, rounded chassis finished in a glossy deep red color. The mixer features a large, detachable stainless steel mixing bowl with a handle, positioned centrally beneath a fixed mixing head. The head houses a visible beater attachment and is flanked by two control knobs, while a power cord extends from the base for electrical connection. The front of the mixer displays a metallic brand logo, and the side reveals a control panel with a speed selector. The chassis is solid and heavy, designed to remain stable during operation, and the overall form is compact yet sturdy. The mixer is suitable for use in kitchens, bakeries, or urban food preparation environments.
description: A glossy red stand mixer with a large stainless steel bowl, control knobs, and a visible brand logo. The design is compact, sturdy, and suitable for countertop use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brand logo, mixing head, and the full opening of the stainless steel bowl.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bowl handle, control panel, and the length of the power cord.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the chassis, power cord exit, and a metallic information plate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bowl handle and the smooth, uninterrupted chassis surface.
attribute_brand_logo: KitchenAid logo is visible on the front of the mixer head.
attribute_control_panel_type: Analog dial and toggle switch on the side for speed and power control.
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with a rounded, streamlined form and a wide, stable base.
